semantic.role: Visual architectural illustration for the ArchSpine mirror system
responsibilities: Provide a graphical representation of the system's structure or data flow
Serve as a quick reference for component relationships
Support both human and automated interpretation of system topology

English.purpose: This document contains a GIF image intended to illustrate the architecture of the ArchSpine mirror system. Its visual layout conveys the relationships and hierarchy among system components in a compact, at‑a‑glance format.
English.context_and_audience: The image is likely part of a larger documentation set; it may be referenced by architecture discussions, onboarding materials, or system overviews. Primary audience includes system architects, developers, and operations staff who need a quick visual reference of how the mirror components are connected.
key_takeaways: The document is a binary image (GIF), not a textual narrative.
It visually depicts the structure of the ArchSpine system – possibly component blocks, data flow arrows, or service boundaries.
It should be viewed with an image viewer to extract full detail; the raw bytes are not human‑readable.
